narrative:
Trumbull County has 130,611 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.8% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.7% D−R vs +21.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
